passages.title: Good Morning
passages.passage: おはよう ございます。わたしは たなかです。よろしく おねがいします。
passages.translation: Good morning. I am Tanaka. Nice to meet you.

vocabularyHighlights.word: おはよう ございます
よろしく おねがいします

questions.question: What time of day is this greeting for?
What is the speaker's name?

passages.title: Coming Home
passages.passage: ただいま。おかえりなさい。いただきます。おいしい！ごちそうさまでした。
passages.translation: I'm home. Welcome home. Thank you for the food (before eating). Delicious! Thank you for the meal (after eating).

questions.question: What does the speaker say when arriving home?
What is said before eating?

passages.title: Counting Things
passages.passage: いち、に、さん、よん、ご。ごまでかぞえました。じゅうは いちと ぜろです。
passages.translation: One, two, three, four, five. I counted to five. Ten is one and zero.

questions.question: How high did the speaker count?
What number is described as 'one and zero'?

passages.title: Saying Goodbye
passages.passage: こんばんは。ありがとう ございます。さようなら。おやすみなさい。
passages.translation: Good evening. Thank you very much. Goodbye. Good night.

vocabularyHighlights.word: ありがとう ございます

questions.question: What time of day does this take place?
Which phrase means 'thank you'?
options: ありがとう ございます

passages.title: Meeting Someone
passages.passage: すみません。はじめまして。わたしは やまだです。がくせいです。よろしく おねがいします。
passages.translation: Excuse me. How do you do? I am Yamada. I am a student. Nice to meet you.

vocabularyHighlights.word: よろしく おねがいします

questions.question: What is Yamada's role?
What does すみません mean here?

passages.title: Leaving Home
passages.passage: おはよう。いってきます。いってらっしゃい。こんにちは。ただいま。おかえり。
passages.translation: Good morning. I'm heading out. Have a good day. Good afternoon. I'm home. Welcome back.

questions.question: What does the person say when leaving home?
What greeting marks the afternoon?

passages.title: Self-Introduction
passages.passage: はじめまして。わたしは メアリーです。アメリカじんです。いま だいがくの にねんせいです。せんこうは にほんごです。よろしく おねがいします。
passages.translation: How do you do? I am Mary. I am American. I am now a second-year college student. My major is Japanese. Nice to meet you.

questions.question: Where is Mary from?
What year student is Mary?
What is Mary's major?

passages.title: What Time Is It?
passages.passage: あのう、すみません。いま なんじですか。いま くじはんです。ああ、そうですか。ありがとう ございます。
passages.translation: Um, excuse me. What time is it now? It's 9:30 now. Oh, is that so? Thank you very much.

questions.question: What time is it?
What does あのう express?

passages.title: At the Store
passages.passage: すみません。これは いくらですか。それは さんぜんえんです。じゃあ、これを ください。はい、ありがとう ございます。
passages.translation: Excuse me. How much is this? That is 3,000 yen. Well then, I'll take this please. Yes, thank you very much.

questions.question: How much does the item cost?
What does ください mean?

passages.title: My Friend
passages.passage: これは わたしの ともだちの たけしさんです。たけしさんは にほんじんです。だいがくの さんねんせいです。せんこうは れきしです。でんわばんごうは ぜろさんの ごろくななの はちきゅうぜろいちです。
passages.translation: This is my friend Takeshi. Takeshi is Japanese. He is a third-year college student. His major is history. His phone number is 03-567-8901.

questions.question: What nationality is Takeshi?
What is Takeshi's major?
What year student is Takeshi?

passages.title: Shopping for a Bag
passages.passage: すみません。あの かばんは いくらですか。あれは よんせんごひゃくえんです。ちょっと たかいですね。じゃあ、この さいふを ください。それは せんにひゃくえんです。
passages.translation: Excuse me. How much is that bag over there? That is 4,500 yen. That's a bit expensive. Well then, I'll take this wallet please. That is 1,200 yen.

questions.question: How much is the bag?
What does the speaker buy instead?
Why didn't the speaker buy the bag?

passages.title: Weekend Plans
passages.passage: どようびに なにを しますか。えいがを みます。なんの えいがですか。にほんの えいがです。いいですね。いっしょに いきませんか。いいですよ。
passages.translation: What will you do on Saturday? I will watch a movie. What movie? A Japanese movie. That's nice. Won't you go together? Sure, let's do it.

questions.question: What day are they talking about?
What will they do?
What kind of movie is it?

passages.title: A Day at School
passages.passage: 月曜日に 大学で 日本語の クラスが あります。九時に いきます。先生は とても いい 先生です。クラスの あとで、図書館で 日本語を べんきょうします。三時に うちに かえります。
passages.translation: On Monday, I have a Japanese class at the university. I go at 9 o'clock. The teacher is a very good teacher. After class, I study Japanese at the library. I go home at 3 o'clock.

questions.question: What day does the speaker have Japanese class?
What time does the speaker go to class?
Where does the speaker study after class?

passages.title: Weekend Shopping
passages.passage: 土曜日に 友だちと 買い物に 行きました。デパートで くつと かばんを 買いました。くつは 八千円で、かばんは 一万二千円でした。たかかったですが、とても いい かばんです。そのあと、レストランで ごはんを 食べました。
passages.translation: On Saturday, I went shopping with a friend. I bought shoes and a bag at the department store. The shoes were 8,000 yen, and the bag was 12,000 yen. It was expensive, but it's a very nice bag. After that, we ate at a restaurant.

questions.question: When did they go shopping?
How much was the bag?
What did they do after shopping?

passages.title: A Trip to Okinawa
passages.passage: 先週、沖縄に 行きました。天気は とても よかったです。海は きれいで、水は あたたかかったです。おきなわの 食べ物は おいしかったです。ゴーヤチャンプルーを 食べました。たのしい りょこうでした。
passages.translation: Last week, I went to Okinawa. The weather was very good. The sea was beautiful and the water was warm. Okinawan food was delicious. I ate goya champuru. It was a fun trip.

questions.question: When did the speaker go to Okinawa?
How was the weather?
How was the food?

passages.title: My Town
passages.passage: わたしの まちに 大きい 公園が あります。公園の 右に 図書館が あって、左に 病院が あります。まいにち 公園で さんぽします。公園の 前に おいしい レストランも あります。よく ともだちと そこで 食べます。
passages.translation: There is a big park in my town. To the right of the park there is a library, and to the left there is a hospital. I take a walk in the park every day. There is also a delicious restaurant in front of the park. I often eat there with friends.

questions.question: What is to the right of the park?
What does the speaker do at the park every day?
Where is the restaurant?

passages.title: Meeting a New Friend
passages.passage: 金曜日に 大学で 新しい 友だちに 会いました。名前は キムさんです。韓国人の 留学生です。日本語が 上手です。いっしょに コーヒーを 飲みました。来週、いっしょに 映画を 見に 行きます。
passages.translation: On Friday, I met a new friend at the university. Their name is Kim. They are a Korean international student. They are good at Japanese. We drank coffee together. Next week, we will go see a movie together.

questions.question: When did the speaker meet their new friend?
Where is Kim from?
What will they do together next week?

passages.title: A Busy Week
passages.passage: 今週は いそがしかったです。月曜日から 金曜日まで まいにち 大学に 行きました。水曜日に テストが ありました。むずかしかったですが、だいじょうぶでした。土曜日は ともだちの うちで パーティーが ありました。とても たのしかったです。日曜日は うちで ゆっくり 休みました。
passages.translation: This week was busy. I went to university every day from Monday to Friday. On Wednesday, there was a test. It was difficult, but it was okay. On Saturday, there was a party at a friend's house. It was very fun. On Sunday, I relaxed at home.

questions.question: How was the speaker's week?
What happened on Wednesday?
What did the speaker do on Sunday?
